text: Surrounded by glass, bright white walls, and bold colors, I feel the pulse of innovation and inquiry. The R+D display exudes energy—its purpose clear in the text: to connect and coexist with intelligent machines. I feel invigorated, yet contemplative. This space urges me to consider not only what humanity creates, but also how those creations shape and redefine humanity in return. Curiosity and a sense of hopeful anticipation buzz quietly beneath the surface.
